submission.title: 木木张和豆角焖面的顿悟
submission.paper_title: Deep Potential Molecular Dynamics: A Scalable Model with the Accuracy of Quantum Mechanics
submission.description: 成功复现DeePMD分子动力学势能面。RMSE=0.005 eV/atom，力预测R²=0.998。验证了对Cu和C体系的准确性。

submission.title: 陈大佬和雷哥的风电场保卫战
submission.paper_title: Wind farm power prediction using deep learning
submission.description: 成功复现CFD风力发电场功率预测。R²=0.9967，RMSE=0.0412。验证了尾流效应对功率预测的影响。

submission.title: 欧神凌晨三点的抉择
submission.paper_title: RustBCA: A high-performance binary collision approximation code
submission.description: 成功复现RustBCA离子束模拟。Si靶R²=0.9997，Ge靶R²=0.9991。验证了溅射产额和射程分布。

submission.paper_title: Wealth Distribution and Asset Prices in a Heterogeneous Agent Economy
submission.description: 成功复现Huggett模型异质性主体经济。8/8组参数通过验证，财富分布Gini系数与原文一致。

submission.title: 组学戴乙己教授的反击
submission.paper_title: A 3D map of the human genome at kilobase resolution reveals principles of chromatin looping
submission.description: 成功复现Hi-C 3D基因组分析。CTCF比值2.37x，TAD边界识别准确率94.5%。验证了染色质环结构。

submission.title: 硬币的另一面
submission.paper_title: Anion optimization for bifunctional surface passivation in perovskite solar cells
submission.description: 成功复现ML分类流程。Round 1 RF AUC=0.9871(17特征)，Round 2 RF AUC=0.9887(4特征)。Top 4特征：num_O, TPSA, HBA, HOMO。

submission.title: 菜市场散伙后的钉子户调查
submission.description: 成功复现TSA-seq基因组可及性分析。Pearson r=0.9434，Spearman ρ=0.9387。验证了核质空间定位与基因表达相关性。
